---
title: "Hands-On Demo: Version Control with Git"
subtitle: "Practical exercises for tracking and sharing research with Git"
author:
  - name: "Fabio Molo"
    orcid: 0000-0001-9320-5854
format:
  html:
    toc-depth: 4
execute:
  eval: false
---

This hands-on demo requires Git. Visit the [instructions](../../instructions/index.qmd) page to learn how to install it.

# Getting started

<!-- TODO: add introductory exercises here -->

## Exercise 1: Initialising a repository

<!-- TODO -->

## Exercise 2: Making commits

<!-- TODO -->

## Exercise 3: Branching and merging

<!-- TODO -->

# Working with remotes

## Exercise 4: Cloning a repository

<!-- TODO -->

## Exercise 5: Push and pull

<!-- TODO -->

# Git for research

## Exercise 6: Creating a release and archiving on Zenodo

<!-- TODO -->

# Additional Resources

-   Happy Git with R: <https://happygitwithr.com>
-   The Turing Way — Version Control: <https://the-turing-way.netlify.app/reproducible-research/vcs>
-   GitHub Skills: <https://skills.github.com>
